title: Arabidopsis-Microbe interaction seed treatment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8jdvr","text":"The treated seeds can grow in medium or bulk soil to determine the impact of novel materials on plants. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"36crn","text":"Seed treatment of arabidopsis seeds is a suitable, simple method for many plant-microbe interactions. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ccrgd","text":"Seed priming is an important method that increases the health of the plant.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fl4je","text":"The only harmful chemical is 50% bleach (2% sodium hypochlorite). Please make sure ware gloves when in the seed sterile steps.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The arabidopsis seeds are immersed with 50% bleach (2% Sodium hypochlorite) in 1.5 µL tubes.
Gently remove the supernatant and leave the seeds in the tube.
The sterile seeds are immersed in distilled water.
go to step #3 Repeat the process of step #3 to #5 for 10 times

The seeds were immersed in the specific concentration of treatment 1. Bacteria treatment: OD value to 0.1 and diluted 10 times. 2. Fungus treatment: The final concentration of spore suspension is 100 spores mL -1 .
The treated seeds are moved in a filter mesh (Favorgen) with a collection tube.
Remove the filter through in collection tube
Add 500 µL of distilled water to the filter column and resuspend the seeds.
go to step #11 Repeat the process of step #11 to #13 for 10 times
creator: Tao-Ho Chang
